rule_metadata.name: dump_tool
rule_metadata.author: @patrickrolsen
rule_metadata.reference: Related to pwdump6 and fgdump tools

rules.rule_text:
rule dump_tool
{
	meta:
		author = "@patrickrolsen"
		reference = "Related to pwdump6 and fgdump tools"

	strings:
		$s1 = "lsremora"
		$s2 = "servpw"
		$s3 = "failed: %d"
		$s4 = "fgdump"
		$s5 = "fgexec"
		$s6 = "fgexecpipe"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and 3 of ( $s* )
}
